problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
hypothesis: Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus may resolve How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
